name: piper nigrum
summary: Piper nigrum contains Beta-caryophyllene and is linked here to CB2 receptor agonism.
description: Piper nigrum contains Beta-caryophyllene and is linked here to CB2 receptor agonism.
mechanismTags: piperine modulation of CYP3A4/CYP2C9/CYP2D6 and P-gp
interactions: Potentially increases exposure of CYP/P-gp substrates and bioavailability-enhanced botanicals such as curcumin.
